center.id: loc-长江三峡水利枢纽工程-749ff9c6
center.name: 长江三峡水利枢纽工程
center.summary: 长江三峡水利枢纽工程是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括白鹤，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The world population was estimated in 2010 at about 3,200 birds, mostly belonging to the eastern population with about 93% of them wintering in the Poyang Lake basin in China, a habitat that may be altered by the Three Gorges Dam
